node.statement: APPROX A2 (2D confinement): AlGaAs/GaAs/AlGaAs quantum well, width ~10nm. Electric subband spacing ~10^3 K. At T<1K, ALL electrons in lowest subband. Project: Psi(x,y,z) = psi(x,y)*chi_0(z). STRICTLY 2D after this. NEGLECTED: finite well width modifies V_ee at short range, see P13-Peterson for ~10-20% corrections to pseudopotentials. [P11-Girvin Sec 1.1.2 p.3-4]
